positive_observation: A name appears in an interface or record.
negative_or_non-equivalent_observation: A shared displayed name need not mean a shared object or bytes.
claim_ceiling: Filename equality is not object identity.

positive_observation: An artifact is visible in Library.
negative_or_non-equivalent_observation: Visibility did not guarantee downstream reuse in the recorded ZIP cases.
claim_ceiling: Library presence is not picker eligibility or materialisation.

positive_observation: A file is selectable in a picker.
negative_or_non-equivalent_observation: Some generated ZIP records were not picker-resolvable while uploaded controls reportedly were.

positive_observation: Search returns a row reference or related result.
negative_or_non-equivalent_observation: A result need not be the exact target or independently usable object.
claim_ceiling: Search success is not exact resolution.

positive_observation: A tool exposes text metadata or a derivative.
negative_or_non-equivalent_observation: Parsed content need not be the original bytes.

positive_observation: An object is attached to a request.
negative_or_non-equivalent_observation: Attachment does not guarantee runtime-local success or byte identity.

positive_observation: Current local bytes can be opened and hashed.
negative_or_non-equivalent_observation: Local availability does not prove historical origin or Library object identity.
claim_ceiling: Current bytes are not route provenance.

positive_observation: A runtime path can be used for a task.
negative_or_non-equivalent_observation: Runtime success does not prove durable Library persistence or later reuse.
claim_ceiling: Runtime state is not durable enrollment.
